name: Limello Fluff
recipeIngredient: 1 envelope Dream Whip® whipped topping mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the lime gelatin according to package directions and let set until almost firm.
2. In a double boiler, combine the cream cheese and marshmallows. Let this mixture partially cool while you prepare the whipped topping mix.
3. In a mixing bowl, using low speed, blend together the cream cheese-marshmallow mixture, whipped topping mix, semi-molded gelatin, and pineapple.
4. Pour the mixture into a mold and chill until firmly set.
